en: That it made you believe in no man, no cry
ko: 네가 말했잖아, 그게 널 믿게 했다고, 울지 마.

en: Maybe that's why Every little thing I do

ko: 내가 하는 모든 작은 것들이 너에게는 충분하지 않은 것 같아.

en: You don't wanna lose it again But I'm not like them
ko: 다시 잃고 싶지 않겠지만, 나는 그들과 달라.

en: Baby, when you wanna be Get to know somebody
Guess what? It's gonna be me
You got no choice, babe But to move on
And you know there ain't no time to waste
ko: 앞으로 나아가야 해, 낭비할 시간이 없잖아.

en: There's so much to find, to see
ko: 그냥 나를 선택해, 알게 될 거야.

en: But in the end you know it's gonna be me You can't deny
So just tell me why Every little thing I do
